scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n backend,frontend -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.dev:backend: backend\.venv\Scripts\python.exe -m uvicorn app.main:app --app-dir backend --reload --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8000 || backend/.venv/bin/python -m uvicorn app.main:app --app-dir backend --reload --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8000 || python -m uvicorn app.main:app --app-dir backend --reload --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8000 || python3 -m uvicorn app.main:app --app-dir backend --reload --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8000
